description_long: This is a rectangular flag featuring three horizontal stripes of red, white, and green from top to bottom, with a prominent yellow sun emblem centered on the white stripe. The flag fabric appears to be slightly rippled, suggesting it is made of a lightweight, flexible textile. The sun emblem is composed of a stylized, radiating pattern with multiple pointed rays. The colors are vivid and distinct, with no visible text or additional symbols. The flag is attached to a thin, vertical pole along one edge, which is visible in the side views. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no signs of damage or wear.
description: A rectangular flag with red, white, and green horizontal stripes and a yellow sun emblem in the center, attached to a thin vertical pole. The fabric is slightly rippled and the colors are vivid.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thinness of the flag and the vertical pole, with the flag's colors barely visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full flag design: red, white, and green stripes with a yellow sun emblem in the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the flag's thin profile and the pole, with a partial glimpse of the colored stripes.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the flag's rippled fabric and the full sun emblem, with all three stripes visible.
attribute_flag_design: The flag consists of three horizontal stripes: red on top, white in the middle, and green on the bottom, with a large yellow sun emblem featuring multiple rays centered on the white stripe. The design is simple, with no text or additional symbols, and the sun emblem is the focal point.
